Devzgn [dev-zahy-n]
Dev elop + + de z i gn

A hybrid discipline that unifies software development and design into a single practice. Devzgn represents a new full-stack language—combining the rigor of the command line with the ability to visualize the impossible. It bridges the traditional gap between designers and developers by fostering a shared mindset rooted in curiosity, craft, and excellence, enabling products that challenge convention and solve real problems.

In 2015, Rehan Butt coined a term for something he couldn't find a word for, a discipline that exists beyond the boundaries of traditional roles. Devzgn isn't just about design and development working together; it's about building a shared language and mindset that makes the boundary itself irrelevant.

Devzgn © 2026 A project by Rehan Butt
